summary: Completed security hardening testing for Budeživo.cz pre-pilot. All 11 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Password validation correctly rejects: <8 chars, missing uppercase, missing lowercase, missing digit

Security headers present on all /api/* endpoints: X-Frame-Options=DENY, X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff, X-XSS-Protection=1; mode=block, Referrer-Policy=strict-origin-when-cross-origin, Permissions-Policy=camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()
VOP section 1.1 correctly contains: Daniela Kytlicová, IČO 07407971, Mlýnská 538
GDPR page correctly shows datová schránka: e2u63pp
HTML lang attribute correctly set to 'cs'
OG meta tags present: og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url, og:locale=cs_CZ, og:site_name
sitemap.xml accessible and lists main pages
JWT_SECRET fail-fast implemented (server won't start without it)
JWT expiration set to 7 days (168 hours)
Rate limiting decorators present: 5/min register, 10/min login, 3/min forgot-password
CORS restricted to budezivo.cz domains + preview domain
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security hardening features fully tested. Backend: 11 tests covering password validation (4 tests), security headers (2 tests), VOP legal data (1 test), login (1 test), static files (2 tests), JWT config (1 test). Frontend: Password strength indicator shows 4 colored bars with checkmarks for each criteria (8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit). GDPR page shows datová schránka e2u63pp. VOP page shows Daniela Kytlicová, IČO 07407971, Mlýnská 538. HTML lang=cs and OG meta tags present.

verified_features.feature: POST /api/auth/register with password < 8 chars returns 400 error
POST /api/auth/register with password missing uppercase returns 400
POST /api/auth/register with password missing digit returns 400
Security headers present on API responses: X-Frame-Options=DENY, X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff, X-XSS-Protection
GET /api/legal/vop returns section 1 with 'Daniela Kytlicová, IČO 07407971'
Login still works with valid credentials demo@budezivo.cz / Demo2026!
Frontend: /register page shows password strength indicator with 4 criteria bars
Frontend: /gdpr page shows datová schránka 'e2u63pp' instead of placeholder
Frontend: /obchodni-podminky page loads VOP with correct provozovatel data
robots.txt is accessible and blocks /admin/ and /api/
sitemap.xml is accessible and lists main pages
